candidate: ASYM-DUAL-PATH: parallel encoder with deliberate asymmetric pathway biases (early-vs-late token emphasis); ILD-style difference channel injects positional information neither pathway encodes alone.

per_result_judgments.note: Source-domain biology only; no LLM/encoder mechanism.
Asymmetric dual-stream transformer (14B video + 5B audio); functionally adjacent though not difference-channel positional.
Dual-encoder survey; lacks asymmetry and difference-channel specifics.
Sparse decorrelation pattern separation; symmetric mechanism.
Asymmetric NN inheritance (parent-child), not parallel asymmetric dual-path.
Direct twin: asymmetric dual-path encoder with difference-channel positional encoding; early-vs-late token bias.
Owl-inspired ILD-style difference channel between two asymmetric pathways; near-identical mechanism.

summary: Ranks 7 and 8 are direct twins of ASYM-DUAL-PATH: an asymmetric dual-path encoder with difference-channel positional encoding (2603.27410) and an explicitly owl-inspired ILD-style difference-channel between two asymmetric pathways (2511.07140). Rank 2 (LTX-2) adds an adjacent asymmetric dual-stream transformer. With sem and func both >=0.9 on near-identical prior art, the candidate's distinctive contribution is already published.
